events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: The legendary Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young for the guitar legend that is Brian May this Sunday. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first aired in the US, changing the music landscape forever with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its debut video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV first hit screens, launching with a track that ironically predicted its own demise. What was your first MTV memory?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened its gates in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people descended on a dairy farm in upstate New York for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: It's 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we said goodbye to the King. Elvis Presley's music remains as timeless as ever.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur died in Las Vegas, he would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty years since the music world lost Tupac Shakur, a voice that defined a generation. His legacy continues to resonate.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Forty-six years ago today, the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away, he would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-six years since the world lost one of its most innovative guitarists. Jimi Hendrix's influence is still felt in music today.

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic cover, in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Which side of the album do you prefer, or is it all just pure genius?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Seventy-five years young for the incredible Chrissie Hynde. Still rocking with The Pretenders!

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 57
events.blurb: The former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 57th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years of pure rock and roll attitude. Happy birthday, Liam Gallagher!

events.title: John Lennon's Imagine turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon released the powerful anthem 'Imagine'. Its message is just as relevant today.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first generation iPod, revolutionising portable music players, in 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. Who remembers their first one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. It's James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: Remembering John Lennon
events.blurb: We remember the legendary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring legacy of John Lennon. Imagine that.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-seven years young for the legendary John Cleese. A true titan of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' White Album turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, officially titled 'The Beatles' but widely known as 'The White Album', in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered their sprawling masterpiece, 'The White Album'. Double album, double the classics.
